summary: Wrong format, had to clarify requirement
detailed_context: Nick asked for a Home Assistant automation syncing a switch and lamp. The AI provided a bidirectional sync in automations.yaml format. Nick corrected: the switch is independent, and they need single-automation YAML format instead. This is a clear miss on format requirement—the AI gave editable-file format rather than new-automation format. Nick had to redirect and clarify intent. Not anger, but definite dissatisfaction requiring a fix.
